tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Manage the account SIP authentication type (Digest, IP Auth, or both) and password.

tags.name: ACL
tags.description: Manage the IP Access Control List for IP-based SIP authentication. Only routable public IPv4 CIDRs with masks /8, /16, /24, or /32 are accepted.

tags.name: Gateways
tags.description: Manage SIP gateways (outbound trunks). System route types (USER, T30, VOICE_BRIDGE, DID, T38, RTC_BRIDGE, SDN) are always present and read-only.

tags.name: Numbers
tags.description: Manage telephone numbers: routing, forwarding, DNIS translation, inbound CNAM lookup, outbound Caller ID Name (LIDB), SMS routing, and fax-to-email.

tags.name: Lookups
tags.description: Per-lookup billed services. CNAM returns the registered Caller ID Name. LRN returns Location Routing Number and carrier details. Requires the service to be enabled on the account.

tags.name: e911
tags.description: Provision and manage e911 emergency service records for telephone numbers on the account.

tags.name: Account
tags.description: Account profile, settings, billing charges, credit history, call detail records, SIP registration status, and self-service signup and password recovery.

tags.name: Support
tags.description: Support ticket management. Customers see only their own tickets. Administrators see all tickets.

e911Entry.description: e911 provisioning record. The sms field is always removed. Additional fields may be present.

payerEmail.description: PayPal email address of the payer.

date.description: Date and time the payment was received.

payments.description: All PayPal payments for the account, newest first.

start.description: Start time as Unix timestamp. Defaults to current time.

end.description: End time as Unix timestamp. Defaults to 24 hours before current time.

password.description: 6-10 alphanumeric characters with at least one letter and one number.

enabled.description: true to enable inbound CNAM lookup, false to disable.

paid.description: Invoice fulfillment status. true = customer has paid the invoice for this credit. false = invoice is still outstanding.

date.description: Timestamp the credit was applied to the account.

limit.description: Maximum concurrent calls. Null for system routes.

system.description: True for built-in system route types.

gateway.description: Gateway IP:port or system route name (USER, T30, etc.)

cnam.description: Outbound caller name. Max 15 alphanumeric characters.

customerOrderReference.description: Optional order reference. Auto-generated if omitted.

authType.description: 0=Digest, 1=IP Auth, 2=Digest OR IP Auth, 3=Digest AND IP Auth

type.description: email=forward to email address, webhook=HTTP POST, sip=direct IP delivery.

resource.description: Email address, webhook URL, or IP address depending on type.

paid.description: Invoice fulfillment status. Always true on the /credits/paid endpoint. Always false on the /credits/unpaid endpoint.

date.description: Timestamp the credit was applied to the account.

credits.description: Full credit history, newest first. Each entry has a paid flag indicating invoice status.
Credits with outstanding invoices (paid=false), newest first.

prefix.description: Digits to prepend on outbound calls.

gateway.description: IP or hostname with optional port. Must resolve to a routable public IPv4 address.

credits.description: Credits with fulfilled invoices (paid=true), newest first.

subject.example: I need help with my account

email.description: Admin only: create ticket on behalf of this customer email.

paid.description: True if the customer has fulfilled the invoice for this credit. False if the invoice is still outstanding. Present on credits history only.

cidr.description: IPv4 CIDR. Must be routable public address. Mask must be /8, /16, /24, or /32.

post.description: Creates a new account. No authentication required. Returns account credentials and API key. A verification email is sent.
post.summary: Sign up for a new account

delete.description: Permanently removes the number from the account. Numbers currently porting cannot be removed.

put.description: Updates the status of a ticket. Customers can only update their own tickets.

get.description: Returns a ticket including its threads. Customers can only view their own tickets.
Returns the current SIP URI and user agent for the registered device.

post.description: Adds a customer reply to an existing ticket. Customers can only reply to their own tickets.
post.summary: Add a reply to a ticket

post.description: Creates a new support ticket. The customer email is automatically populated from the authenticated account. Administrators may optionally specify a different email.

get.description: Returns support tickets. Customers see only their own tickets. Administrators see all tickets.
Returns credits where the customer has fulfilled the invoice (paid=true). These are credits that were applied to the account and have since been settled by the customer.
Returns current MRC broken down by service plus a total. Rate limited: 6 requests per hour per IP.

Returns credits that have been applied to the account but whose invoice has not yet been fulfilled by the customer (paid=false). These represent the outstanding balance the customer is expected to pay.

post.description: Returns call detail records for a time range specified in the request body as Unix timestamps. Rate limited: 6 requests per hour per IP.

put.description: Sets or updates SMS routing for the number.

get.description: Returns the SMS routing configuration for the number. Type is one of: email, webhook, sip.

put.description: Updates the account authentication type and/or password.

get.description: Returns the current authentication type, its description, and all IP ACL entries for the account.

post.description: Assigns a telephone number to the account. Account balance must cover the monthly DID rate.

get.description: Returns all telephone numbers on the account with full detail including route, gateway, forwarding, CNAM, SMS, and fax configuration.

post.description: Adds a SIP gateway. Must resolve to a routable public IPv4 address. Optional port as host:port. Optionally set a dial prefix and concurrent call limit.

get.description: Returns all system route types and user-defined SIP gateways. System routes: 1=USER, 2=T30, 3=VOICE_BRIDGE, 4=DID, 5=T38, 6=RTC_BRIDGE, 8=SDN.

put.summary: Enable or disable inbound CNAM lookup

post.description: Creates a new sub-account. Requires administrator credentials. The new account password is auto-generated and returned.

put.description: Updates account settings. Customers may update: timezone, notify, notify_threshold, caller_id. Administrators may additionally update: ccs, service flags, and rate fields.

get.description: Returns full account details including balance, services, and rates. Rates are read-only. Rate limited: 6 requests per hour per IP.

delete.description: Removes the number from the account and returns it to the available pool. Numbers currently porting cannot be released.
delete.summary: Release a number back to the pool

get.description: Returns all e911 records provisioned for telephone numbers on the account.

post.description: Adds one or more IPv4 CIDR blocks. Only routable public addresses accepted. Mask must be /8, /16, /24, or /32.

409.description: One or more entries could not be added

get.description: Returns all IP CIDR blocks on the account IP authentication ACL.

delete.description: Removes one or more IPv4 CIDR blocks from the ACL.

409.description: One or more entries could not be removed

post.description: Validates the address and immediately provisions it to the telephone number in a single call.

put.description: Provisions an e911 address using a pre-validated addressId from POST /e911/validate.

get.description: Returns the e911 record for a specific telephone number on the account.

put.description: Sets the gateway route for a number.

get.description: Returns all message threads for a ticket. Customers can only view their own tickets.

post.description: Sends a password recovery link to the email address on file. No authentication required.

put.description: Sets the inbound DNIS translation for the number.
Sets the outbound Caller ID Name for the number. Updates local database and submits to carrier. Max 15 alphanumeric characters.

get.description: Returns the Location Routing Number (LRN) and carrier details for the destination number. Billed per lookup.

post.description: Validates a street address for e911 provisioning. Returns the validated address including an addressid for use with PUT /e911/{dn}.

delete.description: Removes a gateway. Will fail if DIDs are currently routed to it.

409.description: Cannot remove — DIDs still routed to it

get.description: Returns the complete credit history for the account — all credits regardless of invoice status. Each entry includes a paid flag: true means the customer has fulfilled the invoice; false means the invoice is still outstanding. Use /v2.2/account/credits/paid or /v2.2/account/credits/unpaid to retrieve a filtered subset.

Returns all PayPal payments received on the account, newest first. Each entry includes the amount, date, PayPal transaction ID, payment status, and the payer email address. Payments represent real cash received; for credit adjustments see GET /v2.2/account/credits.
Returns the Caller ID Name registered for the given 10-digit telephone number. Billed per lookup. Requires CNAM service to be enabled.

402.description: Service not enabled or insufficient balance

info.title: VoiceTel API v2.2
info.description: VoiceTel REST API. All resource identifiers are in the URL path. Authenticate with your API key as a Bearer token. Rate-limited endpoints: account/info, account/mrc, account/cdr — 6 requests per hour per IP.
